summary: Created /literature command (command + skill + agent) for managing specs/literature/ with 5 sub-modes: status, scan, convert (PDF/DJVU to markdown with chunking), validate (index.json consistency), and index (add entries for existing markdown files)

artifacts.summary: Implementation summary covering all 4 phases, decisions, and deviations
Command entry point with argument parsing for 5 sub-modes
Comprehensive skill with status, scan, convert, validate, and index modes
Lightweight agent documentation describing direct-execution pattern
